== Notes for [[Item:Q105828|Q105828]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth): Rajjab 61 AH (April 680 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 10th Muharram 61 AH (12th October 680 AD)

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ali_al-Asghar_ibn_Husayn

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014610458283

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
